case_title: JIAN MING HU VS. MASATO OGAWA,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HU, JIAN MING AS TO DEFENDANT MASATO OGAWA, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA SAKANA JAPANESE SUSHI BAR & GRILL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
